data.raceComments: {"comment":"13. SHE'S SINATRA has bounced back into some good form recently, and she was only beaten by a short-head here 2 weeks ago when starting from a similar wide gate. Depending on how the track is playing, she can go one better in this. 7. UNWANTED needed his fresh-up run at Wingatui when making his South Island debut from the Faulkner stable. He strips fitter, and he is expected to be a sharp improver. 5. BUCKET LIST won a trial before peaking on his fresh run here 2 weeks ago. He was not far off the placings that day, and he will pick up a win at short notice. Stick with him. 2. PERCIVAL has improved since having the blinkers on, and he has hit the line stoutly in his last couple of starts. With a genuine tempo, he can figure in the top 3. 1. FAH RONG would not mind a heavy track, and with conditions to suit him, he is another with each-way claims.","runners":[13,7,5,2,1],"exclusive":true}
